body: Gallery thumbnails on the Portfolio page load all at once on mobile, hurting first paint. Add lazy-loading so images load as they scroll into view.
title: Fix gallery lazy-load on Portfolio page

body: The Porch Light Series page still shows last year's images. Swap in the new selects and update the caption blurb.
title: Update Porch Light page with new selects

body: On narrow phones the top nav wraps and overflows the header, pushing the logo off-screen. Needs a collapsed/hamburger layout under 480px.
title: Mobile nav overflow on small screens

body: Add a simple /prints landing section linking out to the Etsy shop so visitors can buy fine-art prints.
title: Add Prints page linking to Etsy shop
